content.en:
"A palace master!"

Everyone was shocked, but they didn't expect this matter to attract the attention of the palace master.

The highest status of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace is the thirteen palace masters, and each palace master has comprehended the extreme extreme path, and his strength is extremely strong, and he is not weaker than the Lord of the White Night at the end of the realm.

However, when they thought that the strong man who shot this time could ignore the rules of the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, and they could also enter the Primordial Black Sea, it was true that only the palace master could handle it, and they couldn't handle it.

If it was done by a certain palace master of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, it would be fine, but the current situation is obviously not!

Therefore, a palace master of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace came to deal with it.

Soon, a palace master from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace came.

"It's the Blood Saint Palace Master!"

Many Extreme Realm Perfect Masters bowed down to the Blood Saint Palace Master.

Although everyone was the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, the strength and status of the Blood Saint Palace Lord were far higher than theirs.

In the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the hierarchy is strict, and the strength is one level lower, and the status is completely different.

Therefore, in front of the Blood Saint Palace Master, the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were not at the same level as him at all.

"Compare the footage of the accident with me. "

The Blood Saint Palace Lord ordered.

"Yes!"

They project the image again.

The Blood Saint Palace Lord looked at it and said with certainty: "The breath of the shot is very unfamiliar, and it is very weak, it cannot be one of our palace masters, but he did enter the Primordial Black Sea, it is very strange, although my Cause and Effect Extreme Dao is only in the peak realm of Xiaocheng, but try it, if my Cause and Effect Extreme Dao realm is not high, then go to find other Extreme Dao creatures who are good at the Cause and Effect Extreme Dao." "

Immediately, the Blood Saint Palace Lord made a move.

Rumble!!!!

Focusing on the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, an Extreme Path Secret Technique that locks the opponent is unleashed.

In an instant, the Cause and Effect Pole quickly locked on to Ye Tian through time and space.

Rumble!!!!!

One by one, pictures appeared in front of everyone, and soon a Void Sparrow was locked.

However, that is the end of it.

"Extreme path creatures of the Realm Perfect Controller level, how is this possible?"

The Blood Saint Palace Master was also surprised.

He thought it was a true realm perfect controller who was very close to the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, after all, the other party could instantly kill a top Extreme Realm perfect controller of the Extreme Dao Creature!

But now, he knew he was wrong.

The Extreme Dao creature that shot out was a perfect controller of the Void Realm, so it was no wonder that he could enter the Extreme Dao Demon Domain.

"What, it's a Extreme Creature with the perfect controller of the Void Realm!"

"How is this possible, the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm comprehends the Extreme Path?"

"None of us can comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao, but he is a Extreme Dao creature who is the perfect controller of the Void Realm, but he did?"

"Who is this Extreme Creature?"

"I don't know, but if you look it up, you should be able to find out. "

At this time, the Lord of the Holy Spirit asked, "Blood Saint Palace Lord, can't you lock his location either?"

"Can't be locked!" the Blood Saint Palace Master shook his head, "It stands to reason that I can use the Cause and Effect Extreme Path to detect him, his Cause and Effect Extreme Path realm is definitely not as good as mine, and he hasn't even comprehended the Cause and Effect Extreme Path." But then it was as if it was broken, and all the cause and effect were gone. In this way, there are only three possibilities, that is, he is still in the Primordial Black Sea, and there is no way to continue to lock him, or there is a strong person with a higher path of cause and effect than me who is covering the cause and effect for him, and there is another possibility, that is, he has fallen, and the cause and effect are broken. However, I'm leaning towards the second possibility. "

Other Extreme Creatures are also inclined to the second possibility.

Soon, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace began to investigate, and it didn't take long to determine the identity of the Void Dark Sparrow.

Ye Tian entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain as a Void Sparrow, which was easy to find, but now he was not in the Void Sparrow.

And Ye Tian also made a lot of friends with Extreme Dao creatures as a Void Sparrow, and now they have all been captured by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Ice Phoenix Island.

At this time, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix was contemplating and cultivating.

Suddenly, a big hand crossed time and space and grabbed the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

This is a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and the Lord of the Ice Phoenix naturally cannot disobey.

At this time, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix saw a Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm, and among them there was also a Palace Master, the Blood Saint Palace Master.

At this moment, she was directly confused.

What are so many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers doing to catch her, she hasn't offended them!

"I've seen all the seniors!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said respectfully.

"You know the Void Sparrow, right?"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord spoke.

"Yes!" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix nodded.

At this time, the Blood Saint Palace Master said, "The Void Spirit Sparrow entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, snatched the Cause and Effect Purple Flower, and then disappeared. "

"What?"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix was stunned, is his brother so fierce?

As far as he knew, there were countless Realm Perfection Controllers who had entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, and among so many Realm Perfection Controllers, there were even those who held Extreme Dao Treasures.

As a result, his old brother actually snatched the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect.

"Seniors, why did the Void Sparrow capture me when they snatched the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect?" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix asked nervously.

"Because the Void Sparrow is unknown, do you know who he is?"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord asked.

"I don't know, the Void Sparrow saved my daughter because I became friends with him, and I really don't know anything else!" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix hurriedly said.

He knew now that his brother had offended these bigwigs of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

However, he was surprised that his elder brother could actually evade the pursuit of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, which was not easy!

At this time, a Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm proposed: "The Void Sparrow has a very good relationship with this Ice Phoenix Lord, and you can use the Ice Phoenix Lord to lure out the Void Sparrow." "

"This method is feasible, the origin of the Void Sparrow is very mysterious, maybe it is not a creature of my extreme deep sea, and it may even have something to do with the end of the world!"

However, all the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters were very clear that they were curious about why the Void Sparrow was able to master the Extreme Extreme Path in the Realm of Infinite Realm Perfect Controllers, and that was what they cared about.

If they also mastered this secret, wouldn't they have the hope of comprehending the Extreme Path and thus becoming another Palace Master of the Extreme Path Deep Sea Palace?

"Everyone, I have just an ordinary relationship with the Void Sparrow, and I can't attract the Void Sparrow at all. "

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix hurriedly said.

"That's not up to you!" the Blood Saint Palace Lord said coldly.

It's just a perfect controller of the true realm, an ant, there is nothing to sacrifice, if you can obtain the secret of Ye Tian's body, this is countless times more valuable than a causal purple flower.

A Void Realm Perfect Controller mastered the Extreme Path, and this secret was their ultimate goal in finding Ye Tian.

But suddenly.

The Blood Saint Palace Lord received a message, and then his face changed, and he snorted coldly: "Lord of the Ice Phoenix, get out!"

Immediately, with a wave of his hand, he directly removed the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Blood Saint Palace Master, why did you suddenly release the Lord of the Ice Phoenix?"

The Lord of the Holy Spirit and other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were puzzled.
